title: Question topic taxonomy
description: Canonical, asker-INDEPENDENT topic tokens that the classifier service (packages/classifier) may assign to a question. Source of truth for both the classifier (which produces them) and the skill (which gates on them via the host agent's policy.yaml). The split between `safe` and `sensitive` is the privacy gate: tokens in `safe` intersect with packages/skill/src/policy.rs:DEFAULT_AUTO_ANSWER_TOPICS so the skill auto-answers them out of the box; tokens in `sensitive` deliberately do NOT — they require the user's explicit `auto_answer: true` opt-in. Only the small high-stakes core (politics, health, finance, religion, family) stays sensitive; everyday topics like work, news, education, philosophy, personal and relationships are answered by default. Askers do NOT pick the topic; the classifier derives it from the question text. The single fallback `other` is assigned when no other taxonomy member fits and is also outside the auto-answer set.
